description: API-level poa_useful metric reports 0% because it measures raw engine proposedCode not UI reviewer layer
evidence: 25 cases showed poa_useful=false in runner metrics despite UI layer being fixed in reviewer utility remediation

description: Automated review time of 0.156 min/case does not reflect real human review time
evidence: Average is wall-clock time of the automation loop not human cognition time
recommended_action: In a real multi-reviewer cohort measure actual human review session times separately
